summary: Verified refactored shared provider components (Messages and Invoices) work correctly for both Doula and Midwife roles. All pages load correctly with proper role-specific styling.
critical_code_review_comments: Shared component architecture is clean - thin wrappers in role-specific folders pass config to shared components
Role-specific colors working correctly: Doula uses #9F83B6 (lavender), Midwife uses #8CAF8C (green)
ProviderConfig correctly maps endpoints, colors, and routes for each role
All data-testid attributes present for testing (doula-messages-screen, new-message-btn, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared provider components (ProviderMessages, ProviderInvoices) have been successfully verified for both Doula and Midwife roles. The thin wrapper pattern is working correctly where role-specific screens pass DOULA_CONFIG or MIDWIFE_CONFIG to shared components.
flows_verified: ✓ Doula Messages page loads correctly - shows conversation with 'Test Mom Msg' (MOM badge)
✓ Doula Messages uses lavender color scheme (#9F83B6)
✓ Doula Invoices page loads correctly - shows multiple invoices with status filters
✓ Doula Invoices shows Draft/Paid/Cancelled statuses with Edit/Send/Delete actions
✓ Midwife Messages page loads correctly - shows 'No messages yet' empty state
✓ Midwife Messages uses green color scheme (#8CAF8C)
✓ Midwife Invoices page loads correctly - shows multiple invoices with status filters
✓ Midwife Invoices shows correct status badges (Paid/Draft/Cancelled)
✓ Both roles show correct bottom navigation with all tabs accessible

ProviderMessages.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender + button, conversations displayed
ProviderMessages.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green + button, empty state displayed

ProviderInvoices.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - status filters, invoice list, action buttons
ProviderInvoices.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green accent colors, status filters, invoice list
